concerns.text: FR-007 anchors to 'See Edge Cases' rather than a specific User Story ID. While the Edge Cases section describes the timeout behavior, the lens requires explicit anchoring to a story (e.g., US-1 or a new US-4 for 'System Robustness') to prevent orphaned requirement status. The Edge Cases section is not a User Story.

SC-005 anchors to 'See FR-007'. Success Criteria should anchor to the User Story they validate (e.g., US-1), not to a Functional Requirement. This creates a transitive link that obscures the direct story-to-criterion traceability required by the lens.
